channel.title: cutup on Stritter
channel.description: Recent content in cutup on Stritter

item.title: A Certain Trio
item.description: Live Improvisation project of Marcin Morga, Eugene Ignashev and Frederic Stritter. A Certain Trio (ACT) is a music and sound-art performance union based in Vienna consisting of Evgenii Ignashev, Marcin Morga, and Frederic Stritter. Trio’s work incorporates concepts of free improvisation with artistic, social and somatic concepts and practices such as ‘The Discipline of Do Easy’, the cut-up technique, Dada, and others. Photo: Christiano Tekirdali
